I used to play this game but then I stopped playing for about 5 months. When I came back I was permanently banned for no reason, I never used the in game mic, nor have I done anything inappropriate, I was just perma banned out of the blue with no reason given.

reviews.review_title: I got banned for no reason
reviews.review_description: I didn’t even play this game for a month and when I got back on to play again I WAS BANNED FOR 1000000 HOURS FOR TOXICITY LIKE BRO I DIDNT EVEN DO SOMETHING. I rate this game 1/10 cause I got banned FOR SOMETHING THAT I DIDNT EVEN DO

Used to be fun, I played it with my friends and it was the only horror monkey game that would actually scare me but even then you couldn’t use the store.. Then they redesigned the map (literally just a maze) and made the game boring, I stopped playing when the game died off no one was joking in severs anymore (stopped playing for a year) then I came back to see the game and then I’m banned for like 99999 hours?? Mind you, haven’t played in a YEAR. So yeah if your planning on downloading this game go ahead I’mmot gonna stop you, but I would not recommend it.
I hopped on to play and on the screen it said i was banned for “bad” (yes, the reason really said just “bad” as the reason i was banned) and i was banned for 8 YEARS LIKE WHY 😭
I used to love this game then I got banned for "bAd" pls bring this game back and unban me

reviews.review_title: One of the best Gorilla tag horror games
reviews.review_description: Ngl this is one of the best horrors games of gorilla tag the monsters are scary the sound of the monster the style and the jumpscare all good but there is one thing if you play this game for a while it starts lagging but overall is a 4 star Good game

reviews.review_title: Best Gtag horror in a while
reviews.review_description: I truly think this one of the best Gtag horror games just because of the ambiance with the monster groaning and your beating indicating the monster’s presence but I would wish to have a map for the cave map or just go back to the old map just because of the second floor monster being so terrifying.
This is a good game it’s free no point of not getting it it’s day 1 so don’t know if there is a goal of the game or a finish if not please add one but anyway 4 stars
This game was fun before the update but new its basically a copy of primal fear and its so repetitive just running from the same monsters so devs bring back the old map or atleast make a level 2

developer_response.body: Servers are full because of a large playerbase, I cannot afford larger servers as I am getting no fund whatsoever for any work I put in, either remove the review out of courtesy or please understand.

Cupid, or me, cannot actually afford bigger servers. For now, there is 4 server buttons and each of them can hold 20 players. That is as many as can legally be put. I need 190 dollars to support 100 players only. If you can't join servers, that is because there is 20,000 players whom are also trying to play. Please understand, and maybe join the discord and try to support the game if possible. discord.gg/experiape
